ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Continued To Feb-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for status hearing for filing of petition for final distribution or for approval of report on status of administration.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Petitioner Danny Dea and its counsel have failed to appear.
COURT ISSUES AN ORDER TO APPEAR TO COUNSEL, ELIZABETH C. SEARS AND ADMINISTRATOR, DANNY DEA FOR STATUS REGARDING THE CLOSE OF THE ESTATE ON FEB-24-2026 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 204.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SANCTIONS IS FURTHER DIRECTED TO COUNSEL, ELIZABETH C. SEARS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Continued To Dec-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Elizabeth Sears appeared via zoom for Danny Dea (executor).

The Court queries counsel about the Inventory and Appraisal filed without a probate referee appraisal.

Ms. Sears stated that Danny Dea has a 50% interest in the property, that she didn't order an appraisal but will do so in the future, that all the monies in the East West bank account was the only assets, and that she had a medical emergency with her brother on 08-26-25.

The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar.

The Status Hearing on Close of Estate is continued to December 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozada. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Elizabeth Sears (attorney) to appear on September 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Status on Close is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Continued To Aug-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Sears appeared by zoom for Danny Dea (petitioner).

The court referred to second amended petition that was filed by Mrs. Sears in response to the examiner's notes. Mrs. Sears stated that there was some confusion as to what the court wanted and how it was to be titled. Mrs. Sears also stated that she has received no objections and that all of the siblings are in agreement. The court will accept the "second amended petition" as a supplement and waives the notice/publication requirement of CRC 7.53(a). The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Sears appeared by zoom for Danny Dea (petitioner).

Mrs. Sears stated that she filed one document, but it was rejected, that she refiled it with the corrections, that Mr. Dea's address and phone number have been corrected, and requested a continuance to allow the court to review the documents. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Roger T. Picquet. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Continued To May-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Sears appeared by zoom for Danny Dea.

Mrs. Sears stated that she saw the tentative ruling, that the DE-147 form and the DE-147S form have been mailed out to the court, that she is in the process of mailing out the proposed order and asked for a waiver on publication of the amended petition. The Amended Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to May 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Continued To May-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Elizabeth Sears, Esq., for Danny Dea, Petitioner.

The court at the outset reminds counsel of the delay in clearing the issues in this matter as listed in the court's tentative ruling. Counsel offers testimony regarding the delay and requests a continuance to clear the issues.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to May-01-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
